tools.name: aml_screen
tools.description: Screen an entity against Anti-Money Laundering (AML) watchlists including OFAC SDN and UN sanctions. Returns risk level, risk score, recommendation (approve/review/reject), and sanctions match details. Uses Jaro-Winkler fuzzy name matching for accurate detection. Cost: $0.05 USDC per screening. Call

tools.name: kyc_check
tools.description: Run a KYC (Know Your Customer) identity verification check against OFAC and UN sanctions lists. Returns verification status, risk score (0-100), and sanctions/PEP match results. Powered by real government sanctions data (OFAC SDN + UN Security Council). Cost: $0.01 USDC per check. Caller must supply

tools.name: risk_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive regulatory risk assessment report combining KYC verification, AML sanctions screening, and multi-jurisdiction risk analysis. Returns overall risk level, risk score, sanctions results, jurisdiction-specific risk factors, and recommended compliance actions. Cost: $0.10 USDC pe

tools.name: wallet_screen
tools.description: Screen a blockchain wallet address for compliance risk. Combines a direct OFAC sanctioned-address check with on-chain exposure analysis across Ethereum and Base — flagging sanctioned counterparties the wallet transacted with and known mixer (e.g. Tornado Cash) exposure. Returns risk level, score (0-

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: wallet_screen · Private data: wallet_screen · Public sink: aml_screen, kyc_check, risk_report, wallet_screen · Destructive: kyc_check.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: wallet_screen · Private data: wallet_screen · Public sink: aml_screen, kyc_check, risk_report, wallet_screen · Destructive: kyc_check

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
